description: The AB Pet Feeder offers a simple and effective feeding solution for your pet. With dimensions of 12.99 x 12.99 x 2.99 inches and a weight of just 0.99 lb, this mat is easy to place, move, and clean. Its compact size is ideal for both small and medium pets, providing a designated feeding area without taking up much space. Designed for practicality, it helps keep your floors clean while ensuring your pet has a comfortable space to eat. Whether you have a dog or a cat, this feeder integrates effortlessly into your daily routine.
